title: Day Counter (1.21.8)
description: Displays which day it is every morning!
body: This simple, lightweight datapack displays what day it is every morning! ![Day Counter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd0a167002ece22ef4a34b7d556714105033b8f_0.webp) This datapack does not use any ticking funtions, making it for a very optomized and excellent choice! ---------------------- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host?
